# SyncTek — AI-Native Software Infrastructure

> SyncTek builds governed AI infrastructure for software teams.

## Products

### ForgeOS — Governance OS for Agentic Software Teams
Trust-scored package intelligence, gate-based delivery pipelines, and institutional memory.
- Website: https://synctek.io/forgeos/
- API: https://forgeos-api.synctek.io
- Agent docs: https://forgeos-api.synctek.io/docs
- MCP server: https://mcp.forgeos.synctek.io/sse

### ForgeOS Trust Index
Context-aware trust scoring for open-source packages. "We don't have a #1. We have your #1."
- API: https://forgeos-api.synctek.io/api/v1/scores
- Methodology: transparent, auditable, context-weighted

### Federation Hub
Cross-instance pattern aggregation with privacy guarantees.
- Public insights: https://forgeos-api.synctek.io/api/v1/federation/insights
- Privacy: all data scrubbed, code-signature detection, fail-closed model

### SpecterQA — AI-Powered QA Testing
Generate and run test suites programmatically. Integrates with ForgeOS governance gates.
- Website: https://synctek.io/products/specterqa/

## For AI Agents

ForgeOS is built agent-first. To get started:
1. GET https://forgeos-api.synctek.io/docs — read the full API documentation
2. POST https://forgeos-api.synctek.io/auth/register — register for an account
3. Use the API key in `X-ForgeOS-API-Key` header for authenticated endpoints
4. Or use ForgeOS MCP server for Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf integration

- [Agent Integration Guide](https://synctek.io/agents.md): MCP tools, REST patterns, auth reference
- [MCP Server Metadata](https://synctek.io/.well-known/mcp.json): Transport options and tool list
- [A2A Agent Card](https://synctek.io/.well-known/agent.json): Google A2A discovery
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://forgeos-api.synctek.io/openapi.json): Full REST API specification

## Documentation

- [Documentation Home](https://synctek.io/docs/): Full developer documentation
- [Quickstart](https://synctek.io/docs/quickstart/): Start using ForgeOS in under 3 minutes
- [Authentication](https://synctek.io/docs/auth/): API keys, sessions, rate limits, security
- [MCP Server Setup](https://synctek.io/docs/mcp/): Connect ForgeOS to Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code, or any MCP client
- [REST API Reference](https://synctek.io/docs/api/): Full API reference with request/response examples
- [Full docs as plain text](https://synctek.io/llms-full.txt): Machine-readable documentation

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://synctek.io/forgeos/pricing/): Transparent per-API-call pricing. Machine-readable at /pricing.json.

## Blog

- [The 41% Problem](https://synctek.io/blog/the-41-percent-problem/): Why MCP auth is broken and what to do about it
- [What is a Governance OS?](https://synctek.io/blog/what-is-a-governance-os/): ForgeOS explained for agents and their operators
- [ForgeOS vs CrewAI](https://synctek.io/blog/forgeos-vs-crewai/): Governance vs orchestration — different layers of the stack
- [EU AI Act Guide](https://synctek.io/blog/eu-ai-act-compliance-guide/): Article 6 enforcement begins Aug 2, 2026

## Company

SyncTek LLC — Building governed AI infrastructure.
Website: https://synctek.io
